diffs.diff:
--- a/find_env_creation.py
+++ b/find_env_creation.py
@@ -0,0 +1,62 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env python

+"""Find how VLABench creates environments."""

+import os

+import sys

+import inspect

+import subprocess

+

+os.environ['HF_HUB_OFFLINE'] = '1'

+os.environ['MUJOCO_GL'] = 'egl'

+

+vlab_dir = '/opt/VLABench/VLABench'

+

+# Search for env creation patterns

+print('=== Search for load_env, build_env, make_env ===')

+for pattern in ['load_env', 'build_env', 'make_env', 'def create_env', 'dm_task']:

+    result = subprocess.run(['grep', '-rn', pattern, vlab_dir], capture_output=True, text=True)

+    if result.stdout.strip():

+        print(f'\n--- {pattern} ---')

+        for line in result.stdout.strip().split('\n')[:20]:

+            print(f'  {line}')

+

+# Look at evaluator source in detail

+print('\n=== Full Evaluator source ===')

+from VLABench.evaluation.evaluator.base import Evaluator

+src = inspect.getsource(Evaluator)

+print(src)

+

+# Check evaluate method

+print('\n=== Evaluator.evaluate source ===')

+if hasattr(Evaluator, 'evaluate'):

+    src2 = inspect.getsource(Evaluator.evaluate)

+    print(src2)

+

+# Check evaluate_single_episode

+print('\n=== Evaluator.evaluate_single_episode source ===')

+if hasattr(Evaluator, 'evaluate_single_episode'):

+    src3 = inspect.getsource(Evaluator.evaluate_single_episode)

+    print(src3)

+

+# Check what dm_task module has

+print('\n=== dm_task module ===')

+try:

+    from VLABench.tasks import dm_task

+    print(dir(dm_task))

+    if hasattr(dm_task, 'build_from_config'):

+        print(inspect.getsource(dm_task.build_from_config))

+except Exception as e:

+    print(f'Error: {e}')

+

+# Check tasks __init__

+print('\n=== tasks/__init__.py ===')

+with open(os.path.join(vlab_dir, 'tasks', '__init__.py')) as f:

+    content = f.read()

+    print(content[:5000])

+

+# Check if there's a registry

+print('\n=== Task registry search ===')

+result = subprocess.run(['grep', '-rn', 'TASK_REGISTRY\|task_registry\|REGISTRY\|register_task', vlab_dir], 

+                       capture_output=True, text=True)

+print(result.stdout[:3000])

+

+print('\n=== Done ===')
